'''âth-t-y-l''' ('''kathatyeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrophoretize|electrophoretize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-y-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrophoretize|electrophoretize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-t-y-l
|-
! Lemma
| kathatyeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithatyeloko|thithatyeloko]] || [[word:jithatyeloko|jithatyeloko]] || [[word:shithatyeloko|shithatyeloko]] || [[word:kithatyeloko|kithatyeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthatyeloko|thuthuthatyeloko]] || [[word:jujuthatyeloko|jujuthatyeloko]] || [[word:shushuthatyeloko|shushuthatyeloko]] || [[word:kukuthatyeloko|kukuthatyeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthatyeloko|thuthatyeloko]] || [[word:juthatyeloko|juthatyeloko]] || [[word:shuthatyeloko|shuthatyeloko]] || [[word:kuthatyeloko|kuthatyeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthatyeloko|thuthatyeloko]] || [[word:juthatyeloko|juthatyeloko]] || [[word:shuthatyeloko|shuthatyeloko]] || [[word:kuthatyeloko|kuthatyeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethatyeloko|thethatyeloko]] || [[word:jethatyeloko|jethatyeloko]] || [[word:shethatyeloko|shethatyeloko]] || [[word:kethatyeloko|kethatyeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothatyeloko|thothothatyeloko]] || [[word:jojothatyeloko|jojothatyeloko]] || [[word:shoshothatyeloko|shoshothatyeloko]] || [[word:kokothatyeloko|kokothatyeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothatyeloko|thothatyeloko]] || [[word:jothatyeloko|jothatyeloko]] || [[word:shothatyeloko|shothatyeloko]] || [[word:kothatyeloko|kothatyeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothatyeloko|thothatyeloko]] || [[word:jothatyeloko|jothatyeloko]] || [[word:shothatyeloko|shothatyeloko]] || [[word:kothatyeloko|kothatyeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthatyeloko|thĂŠthatyeloko]] || [[word:jĂŠthatyeloko|jĂŠthatyeloko]] || [[word:shĂŠthatyeloko|shĂŠthatyeloko]] || [[word:kĂŠthatyeloko|kĂŠthatyeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathatyeloko|thathathatyeloko]] || [[word:jajathatyeloko|jajathatyeloko]] || [[word:shashathatyeloko|shashathatyeloko]] || [[word:kakathatyeloko|kakathatyeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathatyeloko|thathatyeloko]] || [[word:jathatyeloko|jathatyeloko]] || [[word:shathatyeloko|shathatyeloko]] || [[word:kathatyeloko|kathatyeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathatyeloko|thathatyeloko]] || [[word:jathatyeloko|jathatyeloko]] || [[word:shathatyeloko|shathatyeloko]] || [[word:kathatyeloko|kathatyeloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
